item.title: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd Surges 7.45% to Day's High of Rs 759.8 — Outperforms Sector by 7.54 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex inched up 0.08% after a volatile session, but Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd surged 7.45% on 28 Apr 2026, hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 759.8. This 7.54 percentage-point outperformance over its sector underscores a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market move. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Oil & Natural Gas Corporation Ltd. Rallies 3.48% and Climbs Above All Major Moving Averages
item.description: The Sensex eked out a modest gain of 0.05% on 28 Apr 2026, while Oil & Natural Gas Corporation Ltd. surged 3.48%, outperforming its sector by nearly 1.9 percentage points. This strong single-session performance stands out as a clear stock-specific event amid a broadly flat market backdrop. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Nestle India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1439
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 1439 on 28 Apr 2026, Nestle India Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive 19.33% return over the past year. This milestone comes amid a market environment where the Sensex is trading cautiously, underscoring the stock's standout momentum. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Shree Ajit Pulp and Paper Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 310
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Shree Ajit Pulp and Paper Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 310 on 28 Apr 2026, marking a significant milestone in its upward trajectory. This rally is underpinned by a confluence of strong technical indicators and sustained price momentum, setting the stock apart in the Paper, Forest & Jute Products sector. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Steelcast Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 304.3
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 304.3 on 28 Apr 2026, Steelcast Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive 77.00% rally over the past year. This milestone is underpinned by a strong alignment of technical indicators and sustained price momentum, setting the stock apart in the Castings & Forgings sector. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Nitin Spinners Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 458.4
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 458.4 on 28 Apr 2026, Nitin Spinners Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This rally is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained outperformance relative to its sector and the broader market. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Transglobe Foods Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 537.8
item.description: Surging to an intraday peak of Rs 537.8 on 28 Apr 2026, Transglobe Foods Ltd has marked a significant milestone by reaching a new 52-week high. This breakout is underscored by a confluence of technical indicators signalling robust momentum, even as the broader market shows mixed trends. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Simmonds Marshall Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 189.35
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 189.35 on 28 Apr 2026, Simmonds Marshall Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week and all-time high, marking a remarkable 75.47% gain over the past year. This rally stands out amid a broader market that has struggled, with the Sensex down 3.50% over the same period. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Laxmi Dental Ltd Surges 8.63% to Day's High of Rs 208.9 — Outperforms Sector by 7.25 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex inched up 0.19% after a volatile session, but Laxmi Dental Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector with an 8.63% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 208.9. This 7.25 percentage-point outperformance signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd Surges 7.06% to Day's High of Rs 1636 — Outperforms Sector by 2.62 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex inched up 0.19% after a volatile session, while Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd surged 7.06% to touch a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1636. This 2.62 percentage point outperformance over the Ferro & Silica Manganese sector’s 5.14% gain highlights a stock-specific strength that rewrites the short-term narrative for this small-cap player. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: KNR Constructions Ltd Surges 7.08% to Day's High of Rs 131 — Outperforms Sector by 6.01 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex inched up 0.19% after a volatile session, but KNR Constructions Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.08% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 131. This 6.01 percentage-point outperformance over the construction sector highlights a stock-specific surge rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Steelcast Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 304.10 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Steelcast Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching an all-time high price of ₹304.10 on 28 Apr 2026, reflecting its robust performance in the Castings & Forgings industry. This achievement underscores the company’s sustained growth and strong market presence, supported by impressive financial metrics and a bullish technical trend. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Silkflex Polymers (India) Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 206, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Silkflex Polymers (India) Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.99% on 28 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Sonu Infratech Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.98% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 59.0, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Sonu Infratech Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.98% on 28 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: LKP Securities Ltd Reports Stabilised Financial Trend Amid Mixed Quarterly Results
item.description: LKP Securities Ltd has reported a flat financial trend for the quarter ended March 2026, signalling a stabilisation after a period of negative momentum. While net sales and profit before tax excluding other income have shown robust growth, the company’s net profit after tax has declined, reflecting a mixed performance that investors should carefully analyse in the context of broader market trends and historical benchmarks. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Banka Bioloo Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 74.56, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Banka Bioloo Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 28 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Netweb Technologies India Ltd Sees Robust Value Trading and Institutional Interest Amid Strong Buy Upgrade
item.description: Netweb Technologies India Ltd, a small-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has witnessed a remarkable surge in trading activity and price performance, driven by robust institutional interest and significant value turnover. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, signalling strong momentum and renewed investor confidence. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Eco Recycling Ltd Reports Strong Quarterly Turnaround with Robust Revenue and Margin Gains
item.description: Eco Recycling Ltd has demonstrated a remarkable financial turnaround in the quarter ended March 2026, reversing a negative trend to deliver its highest quarterly revenue and profit metrics in recent history. The company’s net sales surged to ₹18.61 crores, while profit after tax (PAT) soared by 74.1% compared to the previous four-quarter average, signalling renewed operational strength in the Other Utilities sector. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Waaree Energies Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Momentum
item.description: Waaree Energies Ltd has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock’s recent outperformance relative to its sector and sustained gains over consecutive sessions highlight growing investor confidence amid evolving market dynamics. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Reliance Communications Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.12% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 1.01, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Reliance Communications Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.12% on 28 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 23 minutes ago
